title: CommunityBoardApplication
description: An application from a Queens resident to be appointed to a community board — the QBP's flagship participatory act (the '2026 Queens Community Board Application Process'). NET-NEW: there is NO public API and NO Open Data twin; today residents apply through an HTML/PDF form on queensbp.nyc.gov. This schema serves both the read surface (an applicant checking their own submission) and the write surface (submit an application). It is the one net-new WRITE object for this domain.

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application/confirmation number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by the Borough President's office, not the applicant.

boardPreference.description: The community board the resident wishes to serve on (they must live, work, or have significant interest in the district).

priorService.description: Whether the applicant has previously served on a community board.

statementOfInterest.description: Why the applicant wants to serve / relevant experience.

resumeUrl.description: Optional link to an uploaded resume.
